description: Classification-decision token emitted by the solution-authoring gate at decision time. Written by the agent (L0) and optionally corroborated by the PostToolUse event logger (L1). Consumed by gate-reconciliation-core.ps1 (L2) and the Code-Critic missed-gate perspective (L3).

decision_id.description: Slug identifying this decision — matches the engagement-record decision_id or finding_dispositions finding_id.

phase.description: Pipeline phase in which the gate fired.

outcome.description: How the gate resolved. 'asked' = structured question was fired. All other values = lawful skip.

classification.description: The gate's classification of the decision. 'not-applicable' when outcome is gate-fails or greenfield-defer.

window_position.description: Which gate firing position this token belongs to. 'pre-ask' = upstream structured question. 'disposition' = adversarial finding disposition (#615 surface). 'judge-merge' = plan judge-merge disposition (#605 surface). 'review-disposition' = review-verdict disposition gate firing position.

timestamp.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp when the token was emitted.

session_key.description: Optional: the session key used by the event logger hook (L1) so the L2 validator can locate corroborating L1 events without re-deriving the key.

issue_number.description: The GitHub issue number this decision belongs to. Required for per-issue scoping in the L2 reconciliation validator.

skip_reason.description: Optional human-readable note when outcome is a lawful skip. Never present when outcome = 'asked'.
